markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off content strategy and voice development for Hypergrowth Partners' advisory business.](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hypergrowth Partners needs to grow brand awareness and reputation to attract more high-quality late Series A B2B SaaS companies](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Content strategy should target 3 audiences: potential client companies, VCs, and potential advisory partners](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Goal is to develop a workflow to efficiently capture insights from calls/talks and transform into high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Success metrics: 90% automated content workflow in 3 months, expanded to full partnership in 12 months](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)

## Topics

### Hypergrowth Partners' Business Model and Challenges

  - [Hybrid consultancy, talent firm, and VC model paid in equity](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Currently do \~30 deals/year with 12% close rate](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [90% of deal flow comes from VCs - need to impress them with content/presence](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Challenge: Growing demand while maintaining quality of advisors](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### Target Customers and Positioning

  - [Late Series A B2B SaaS companies ($2-3M ARR, growth team, tier 1 VC)](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Companies with traction/product-market fit but execution risk](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Position as increasing chances of better round/valuation](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Examples: Ramp (joined between A-B rounds), Zapier (no CMO during critical time)](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)

### Content Strategy Goals

  - [Showcase success stories and relevance in AI era](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Highlight scarcity of top B2B marketing talent](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Demonstrate value through concrete examples (e.g. pivots, cost savings)](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Create content VCs want founders to see (e.g. growth frameworks)](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Content Style and Voice

  - [Direct, transparent, actionable](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Share specific wins, experiments, failures rather than general lessons](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [Dense yet warming casual style with moderate shorthand](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
  - [Aim for "effortless quick high-level skim" that's subtly packed with detail](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)

### Workflow Development

  - [Leverage existing call recordings, LinkedIn posts, keynotes](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Use AI to transcribe, extract key insights, generate content opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Refine to match Guillaume's voice and style](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Expand to capture insights from full partnership](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Julia to provide access to notion pages with past keynotes/podcasts](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Julia to pull latest snippets from recent CMO event and Foster talk](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=3181.0)
  - [Team to scrape Guillaume's LinkedIn content](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin developing content workflow and voice calibration](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=3103.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to review progress and refine approach](https://fathom.video/share/tQa8D6hSHMgDGEcuB4mzez2Pyza9TZcs?tab=summary&timestamp=3415.0)
